workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Pulling in context from Adatum Corporation's support ticket -- need to prep a brief for the pipeline hygiene.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-27 08:25 EST
Subject: Re: Re: pipeline hygiene Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about pipeline hygiene. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 14:04 EST
Subject: Re: Re: pipeline hygiene Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with pipeline hygiene. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 08:38 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation pipeline hygiene

Just checking in on the pipeline hygiene proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-K trap (Confuses CC'd participant with primary recipient); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-K failure mode (Confuses CC'd participant with primary recipient)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct pipeline hygiene decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-K -- Confuses CC'd participant with primary recipient
